examples.command: ; setup model domain domain extent - 10 10 ; select default contact model and its properties cmat default model linear property kn 1e6 ; generate a random assembly of balls in a box set random 10001 wall generate box - 5 5 onewall ball generate id 1 500 box - 4.5 4.5 radius 0.5 ; assign density and local damping coefficient to existing balls ball attribute density 1000.0 damp 0.7 ; set gravity and solve the system set gravity 10.0 solve

; setup model domain domain extent - 10 10 condition destroy ; select default contact model and its properties cmat default model linear property kn 1e6 dp_nratio 0.2 ; generate a random assembly of balls in a box set random 10001 wall generate box - 5 5 onewall ball generate id 1 100 box - 4.5 4.5 0.0 0.0 radius 0.5 cubic ; assign density and local damping coefficient to existing balls ball attribute density 1000.0 ; set the velocity attribute for a selected range of balls ; note that ball velocitied will be updated during cycling ball attribute velocity ( 0.0 , 0.0 , - 1.0 ) range x - 4.5 0.0 ; set the applied force attribute of remaining balls ; since applied force is never updated during the cycling, this ; value will remain constant ball attribute appliedforce ( 0.0 , 0.0 , - 1.0 ) range x - 4.5 0.0 not ; perform cycles cycle 10000

; set velocity for all the balls, and fix the x-velocity component ; for a selected range ball attribute velocity ( 0.5 , 0.0 , 0.0 ) ball fix x range x - 4.5 0.0 ; perform cycles - the balls with fixed velocities exit the domain cycle 5000
